footer.tagline: Free, ATS-friendly resumes. Build, share by link, and export to PDF or DOCX in minutes.

home.heroTitleA: Build a CV that gets you
home.lead: Build an ATS-friendly CV that still looks designed. Edit your draft once, switch templates freely, then download the exact file format you need.

workflow.title: Pick the structure
workflow.description: Start from ATS-safe templates with real layout differences, not just color swaps.

workflow.title: Edit once
workflow.description: Your sections, ordering, accent color and typography stay reusable across designs.

workflow.title: Export directly
workflow.description: Download PDF, DOCX or ZIP from the editor without waiting on a background queue.

home.exportsTitle: A resume builder that respects the file at the end.
home.exportsLead: The editor is useful only if the final download is reliable. CVMaker keeps export formats visible, direct and consistent with the preview.

trust.title: ATS first
trust.description: Every export keeps the resume as selectable text with predictable section hierarchy.

trust.title: Shareable links
trust.description: Publish a public CV page with navigation, downloads and a fast reader-friendly preview.

trust.title: Private drafts
trust.description: Your working drafts stay behind your account until you explicitly publish them.

home.rangeLead: Conservative, technical, executive and editorial layouts share one draft model.

cvs.title: My CVs
cvs.subtitle: Create, edit and export your resumes.
cvs.emptyDescription: Pick a template to start building your resume.
cvs.deleteDescription: “{title}” will be permanently deleted. This can’t be undone.
cvs.deleteDescriptionPublic: “{title}” will be permanently deleted, including its public share link. This can’t be undone.

assets.title: Assets
assets.subtitle: Files live in a private store. Toggle sharing to publish a synced copy to the public store; every update re-syncs automatically.
assets.empty: No assets yet. Upload a file, then toggle sharing to publish a public copy.
assets.syncDesc: The public copy is syncing in the background.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription, payment methods and invoices.
billing.portalUnavailable: We couldn't open the billing portal right now. Please try again in a moment, or contact support if this keeps happening.
billing.proDescription: You're on Pro — all premium templates and unlimited drafts are unlocked.
billing.freeDescription: Upgrade to Pro to unlock premium templates and unlimited CV drafts.
billing.portalDescription: Manage your subscription, payment methods and invoices securely in Polar.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Manage 2FA and account verification.
security.twoFactorDescription: Add a second step at sign-in using an authenticator app (TOTP).
security.setupInstructions: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.
security.backupDescription: Each code works once. Store them somewhere safe — they let you sign in if you lose your authenticator.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.subtitle: Devices currently signed in to your account. Local/dev sessions are grouped to avoid clutter. Revoke any you don't recognize.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to your CVMaker account.
login.twoFaDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a backup code.

reset.requestDescription: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
reset.sentDescription: If an account exists for that address, we've sent a reset link.
reset.performDescription: Enter a new password for your account.
reset.updatedDescription: You can now sign in with your new password.

verify.verifiedDescription: Your email is confirmed. You're all set.
verify.failedDescription: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
verify.title: Verify your email
verify.descriptionUser: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to confirm your address.
verify.descriptionGeneric: We sent you a verification link. Click it to confirm your address.
verify.waiting: Waiting for the verification link to be opened...

templates.title: Choose your template
templates.subtitle: Start with up to {limit} free CV drafts, or upgrade to unlock premium templates and higher draft capacity.
templates.draftDialogTitle: You have a draft with this template
templates.draftDialogDescription: "{title}" already uses this template (edited {date}). Continue editing it, or start a fresh CV. Your existing draft is kept either way.

share.dialogDescription: Make this CV public to share it with a link. The public copy can be viewed and downloaded by anyone.
share.emptyDescription: Add details or remove the empty sections before sharing: {sections}.
share.anyoneCanView: Anyone with the link can view
share.onlyYou: Only you can see this CV
share.updateHint: Edited your CV? Click “Update public copy” to re-publish the latest version.
share.nowPublicDesc: Anyone with the link can view and download it.
share.emptyToast: Some sections are empty: {sections}. Add details or remove them before sharing.

export.emptyToast: Some sections are empty: {sections}. Add details or remove them before exporting.

editor.emptySection: This section is empty — add details or remove it before exporting.

sections.customHint: Add your own sections (e.g. Awards, Publications) and reorder them. They render after the built-in sections.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or may have moved.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error interrupted this page. Try again — if it keeps happening, head back and start fresh.

global.title: Something went wrong
global.description: A critical error stopped the app from loading. Please reload the page to continue.

auth.notFoundDescription: That authentication page doesn’t exist. Sign in or create your account to continue.
auth.errorDescription: We couldn’t complete that request. Please try again.

dashboard.notFoundDescription: This dashboard page doesn’t exist. Pick a section from the menu, or return to your dashboard.
dashboard.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading your account. Try again in a moment.

editor.notFoundDescription: This resume doesn’t exist, or you no longer have access to it.
editor.errorDescription: Reload the editor to continue — your saved changes are safe.
